name: Bacon, Lettuce, & Tomato Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Pounds potatoes, cooked, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked, peeled, and cubed potatoes with the halved cherry tomatoes.
2. Add the crumbled bacon and diced hard-cooked eggs to the bowl.
3. Pour in the purchased potato salad dressing and toss everything together until well coated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for about 30 minutes to allow the flavors to blend.
5. Spoon the salad onto a platter lined with shredded lettuce.
